underlying_goal: Build a complete production-ready Claude Skills Directory website from scratch with Next.js, Supabase, and specific design aesthetic
friction_detail: Multiple build failures due to Supabase client requiring env vars during static prerendering, requiring several iterations to fix.
brief_summary: User asked Claude to implement an entire directory website from an implementation plan (63 files, 19 routes), then add a config/setup guide, and Claude delivered everything successfully after fixing build issues.
